## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, ...)
- [ ] Commits are signed (`git commit -S`)
- [ ] `gofumpt`, `golangci-lint`, and `go test -race ./...` pass locally
- [ ] Tests added/updated for behaviour changes
- [ ] Docs updated if behaviour or config changed
